---
title: "Processing the POU5F1 ChIP-seq data from Ji et al. 2016"
output: html_document
date: "2025-03-06"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Data download

```{sh download}
pd=/your/project/directory/
wd=$pd/data/validations/POU5F1_ChIP_seq
mkdir -p $wd/fastq
mkdir -p $wd/logs
cd $wd/fastq

for srr in SRR2056020 SRR2056023 SRR2056024; do

  sbatch \
    --job-name=download_${srr} \
    --output=$wd/logs/download_${srr}_%j.out \
    --error=$wd/logs/download_${srr}_%j.err \
    -c 8 \
    --mem=16G \
    --wrap="fasterq-dump \
      --split-files \
      --threads 8 \
      --outdir $wd/fastq \
      $srr"

done
```

```{sh rename}
cat > rename_map.txt <<'EOF'
SRR2056023	POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCS_repl1
SRR2056024	POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCS_repl2
SRR2056020	input_H1_hESCs
EOF

while read old new; do
  mv "${old}.fastq" "${new}.fastq"
done < rename_map.txt
```

```{sh compress}
for f in *.fastq; do
  sample=${f%.fastq}

  sbatch \
    --job-name=compress_${sample} \
    --output=$wd/logs/compress_${sample}_%j.out \
    --error=$wd/logs/compress_${sample}_%j.err \
    -c 8 \
    --mem=4G \
    --wrap="pigz -p 8 $f"
done
```

```{sh qc}
mkdir -p $wd/fastq/fastqc
for f in *.fastq.gz; do
  sample=${f%.fastq.gz}

  sbatch \
    --job-name=fastqc_${sample} \
    --output=$wd/logs/fastqc_${sample}_%j.out \
    --error=$wd/logs/fastqc_${sample}_%j.err \
    -c 4 \
    --mem=4G \
    --wrap="fastqc -o $wd/fastq/fastqc $f"
done
```

```{sh trim}
mkdir -p $wd/trimmed_fastq

for f in *.fastq.gz; do
  sample=${f%.fastq.gz}
  sbatch \
    --output=$wd/logs/trimming_${sample}_%j.out \
    --error=$wd/logs/trimming_${sample}_%j.err \
    --job-name=trimming_${f%.fastq.gz} \
    -c 20 \
    --mem=12G \
    --wrap="cutadapt -j 20 \
      -a AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCA \
      -o $wd/trimmed_fastq/${f%.fastq.gz}_trimmed.fastq.gz \
      $f"
done
```

# Bowtie alignment

```{sh bowtie2_index}
mkdir -p $wd/mapping
mkdir -p $wd/mapping/index
sbatch --job-name=bowtie_index_genome_hg38 --wrap="bowtie-build $pd/data/neural_differentiation_dataset/genomes/hg38/genome.fa hg38"
```

```{sh map}
index=$wd/mapping/index/hg38

for fq in $wd/trimmed_fastq/*.fastq.gz; do
  sample=$(basename "$fq" .fastq.gz | sed 's/_trimmed$//')

  sbatch \
    --job-name=bowtie_${sample} \
    --output=$wd/logs/bowtie_${sample}_%j.out \
    --error=$wd/logs/bowtie_${sample}_%j.err \
    -c 16 \
    --mem=16G \
    --wrap="
      # align + coordinate sort
      bowtie \
        -k 1 \
        -m 1 \
        -n 2 \
        $index \
        $fq \
      | samtools view -@ 4 -bS - \
      | samtools sort -@ 4 \
          -o $wd/mapping/${sample}.sorted.bam
      
      # name-sort
      samtools sort \
        -n -@ 4 \
        -o $wd/mapping/${sample}_nameSorted.bam \
        $wd/mapping/${sample}.sorted.bam
    "
done
```


# Genrich peak calling

```{sh get_blacklist}
mkdir -p $wd/peaks
cd $wd/peaks
wget https://www.encodeproject.org/files/ENCFF356LFX/@@download/ENCFF356LFX.bed.gz
gzip -d ENCFF356LFX.bed.gz
```

```{sh call_peaks}
genrich=$pd/Genrich/Genrich

sbatch \
  --job-name=genrich_POU5F1 \
  --output=$wd/logs/genrich_POU5F1_%j.out \
  --error=$wd/logs/genrich_POU5F1_%j.err \
  -c 8 \
  --mem=16G \
  --wrap="
    $genrich \
      -t $wd/mapping/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCS_repl1_nameSorted.bam,$wd/mapping/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCS_repl2_nameSorted.bam \
      -c $wd/mapping/input_H1_hESCs_nameSorted.bam \
      -o $wd/peaks/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCs_peaks_BL.narrowPeak \
      -E $wd/peaks/ENCFF356LFX.bed \
      -v \
      -y \
      -q 0.05 \
      -e MT,Y
  "
cp $wd/peaks/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCs_peaks_BL.narrowPeak $pd/data/validations/ChIP_seq/
```

# QC

```{sh frip}
mkdir -p $wd/peak_qc

sbatch \
  --job-name=frip_POU5F1 \
  --output=$wd/logs/frip_POU5F1_%j.out \
  --error=$wd/logs/frip_POU5F1_%j.err \
  --mem=4G \
  --wrap="

    peaks=$wd/peaks/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCs_peaks_BL.narrowPeak
    outfile==$wd/peak_qc/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCs_FRiP.tsv

    echo -e \"replicate\tmapped_reads\treads_in_peaks\tFRiP\" > \$outfile

    for repl in repl1 repl2; do
      bam=$wd/mapping/POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCS_\${repl}.sorted.bam

      mapped=\$(samtools view -c -F 4 \$bam)
      inpeaks=\$(bedtools intersect -u -abam \$bam -b \$peaks | samtools view -c)

      frip=\$(awk -v a=\$inpeaks -v b=\$mapped 'BEGIN{printf \"%.6f\", a/b}')

      echo -e \"\$repl\t\$mapped\t\$inpeaks\t\$frip\" >> \$outfile
    done
    column -t \$outfile
  "
```

```{r load_libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(ChIPseeker)
library(plyranges)
library(ggsignif)
library(rtracklayer)
library(here)

here::i_am("scripts/2.validations/2.6.ChIP_seq/POU5F1_ChIP_seq.Rmd")
wd <- here("data/validations/ChIP_seq_enrichment")
fig_dir <- here(wd, "figures")
dir.create(fig_dir)
```

```{r tss_enrichment}
chip_peaks <- read_narrowpeaks(here(wd, "POU5F1_ChIP_H1_hESCs_peaks_BL.narrowPeak")) %>% 
  filter(!seqnames %in% c("chrM", "chrY"))
seqlevelsStyle(chip_peaks)
nrow(as_tibble(chip_peaks))

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
promoter <- getPromoters(TxDb = txdb, upstream = 3000, downstream = 3000)
tagMatrix <- getTagMatrix(chip_peaks, windows = promoter)
ChIPseeker::tagHeatmap(tagMatrix)
ggsave(here("data/validations/NANOG_ChIP_seq/peak_qc/tss_enrichment_heatmap.png"), width = 5, height = 4)

plotAvgProf2(chip_peaks, TxDb=txdb, upstream=3000, downstream=3000,
             xlab="Genomic Region (5'->3')", ylab = "Read Count Frequency", conf = 0.95, resample = 1000)
ggsave(here("data/validations/NANOG_ChIP_seq/peak_qc/tss_enrichment_avg_profile.png"), width = 5, height = 4)
```

# Module enrichment

```{r atac_peaks_module_genes}
# all genes in network
all_genes <- readRDS(here("data/neural_differentiation_dataset/processed_data/genes.rds"))

# POU5F1 module members
POU5F1_mod_genes <- readRDS(here("data/neural_differentiation_dataset/CroCoNet_analysis/pruned_modules.rds")) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(regulator == "POU5F1") %>% 
  pull(target) 

# load human iPSC ATAC-seq data
atac_peaks <- readRDS(here("data/validations/ATAC_seq_peak_to_gene_associations/human_peak2gene_associations.rds")) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(origin != "unique_npc" & gene_name %in% all_genes) %>% 
  dplyr::transmute(seqnames, start = start.ipsc, end = end.ipsc, name = name.ipsc, gene_name, in_module = gene_name %in% POU5F1_mod_genes) %>% 
  as_granges()
```

```{r overlaps}
overlaps <- join_overlap_left(atac_peaks, chip_peaks) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(gene_name, in_module) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(overlap_chipseq = sum(!is.na(name.y)) > 0) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::count(in_module, overlap_chipseq) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(in_module = ifelse(in_module, "yes", "no"),
                overlap_chipseq = ifelse(overlap_chipseq, "yes", "no")) 
saveRDS(overlaps, here(wd, "POU5F1_ChIP_module_overlaps_hPSCs.rds"))

table <- overlaps %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "in_module", values_from = "n") %>% 
  column_to_rownames("overlap_chipseq") %>% 
  as.matrix()
table

fisher_test_result <- fisher.test(table)
fisher_test_result
```

```{r plot_overlaps}
annot <- case_when(fisher_test_result$p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
                   fisher_test_result$p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
                   fisher_test_result$p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
                   T ~ "n.s.")
overlaps %>% 
  group_by(in_module) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(overlap_chipseq == "yes") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(in_module = factor(ifelse(in_module == "yes", "POU5F1\nmodule", "other"), c("other", "POU5F1\nmodule"))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = in_module, x = frac, fill = in_module)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  xlab("fraction of genes with associated\nPOU5F1 ChIP-seq peak(s)") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
        plot.margin = margin(5.5, 30, 5.5, 5.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey60", "#08635C"), guide = "none") +
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("POU5F1\nmodule", "other")), annotations = annot, vjust = 0.4, size = 0.3) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.08)))
ggsave(here(fig_dir, "POU5F1_ChIP_module_overlaps_hPSCs.png"), width = 5, height = 3)
```
